title: schoenorchis filiformis
intro: Schoenorchis filiformis, also known as the slender shoal orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, including reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, the roots of Schoenorchis filiformis are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be taken to harness its medicinal properties.
